nodes.name: LegiScan: getSearch
nodes.notes: API key is an n8n Variable: Settings > Variables > LEGISCAN_KEY. Free key from legiscan.com. year=2 = current TX session.

nodes.name: Get existing legislation
nodes.notes: Runs once per trigger; 'Build legislation file' reads its output via $() to dedupe by slug.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "message": "Legislation: " + $('Build legislation file').item.json.title, "content": $('Build legislation file').item.json.contentB64, "branch": "legislation/" + $('Build legislation file').item.json.slug } }}

={{ { "title": "Legislation: " + $('Build legislation file').item.json.title, "head": "legislation/" + $('Build legislation file').item.json.slug, "base": "main", "body": "Auto-drafted by the LegiScan tracker. VERIFY the statute/bill description against the official record (Claude + Descrybe) before merging." } }}

parameters.subject: =New legislation draft: {{ $('Build legislation file').item.json.title }}
parameters.message:
=

New legislation entry drafted: {{ $('Build legislation file').item.json.title }}

Open the PR & preview on GitHub

Before merging: have the statute/bill description fact-checked (Claude + Descrybe) against the official record.
